name: Rhubarb Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat the softened cream cheese and sugar until fluffy using an electric mixer.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, making sure to beat well after each addition.
5. Fold in flour and lemon rind until well combined.
6. Stir in 1/2 cup of the rhubarb sauce.
7. Pour batter into the greased pan.
8. Bake cake until center is just set, about 1 hour.
9. Turn off oven and let the cake sit in the oven for an additional 1 hour.
10. Refrigerate cake for at least 4 hours or overnight.
11. Loosen edges and carefully remove sides of the pan.
12. Place cake on a serving plate and top with remaining rhubarb sauce.
